summary_one_line: A valid font blob whose shaped NSM glyph carries modified-combining-class CCC132 (sign u), reaching the deep Tibetan switch arm.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: A structurally valid font blob that, after shaping, produces a non-spacing-mark glyph whose modified combining class equals HB_MODIFIED_COMBINING_CLASS_CCC132 so the deep switch arm at line 160 is taken. This is a high-arity switch over a combining-class integer derived from glyph tables, not a single comparison against an input literal.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: The non-I2S winners (naive, value_profile) drive plain byte/havoc mutation on a valid font structure and accumulate the table/glyph bytes that yield a CCC132 mark; the winner-resolving seeds hit the true side 23 times (L160 W T=23) and the winner's edge/CMP_MAP feedback rewards reaching new combining-class arms incrementally without diverting budget into operand substitution.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: Both losers add I2SRandReplace, whose per-execution CMP-buffer processing and operand substitution spend mutation budget chasing byte-level CMP matches; but line 5664's true side is gated by a derived combining-class value computed from font tables, not by any input byte literal an I2S operand could supply, so the I2S stage yields no progress and the losers never take the CCC132 arm (L160 L T=0), blocking all 10 trials.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: The winner is enabled by plain coverage-guided havoc/byte mutation over valid font structure; the input-to-state substitution technique that distinguishes the losers is actively counterproductive here, diverting budget to operand substitution that cannot influence a table-derived combining-class switch. The winning side requires no CMP introspection, so the enabling technique is havoc-only byte mutation.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocked true side is a switch case on a modified combining class (CCC132 / sign u), not a comparison against an input byte literal.
evidence_trail.cited_locator: L6 source line / L173 SOURCE CONTEXT

evidence_trail.claim: The combining class is computed in recategorize_combining_class and switched at line 82, reached via the NSM mark-recategorization shaping path.
The branch is reached only for glyphs whose general category is non-spacing mark, deep inside the OT shaping fallback path.
Both decisive pairs have the non-I2S fuzzer as winner and the I2S fuzzer as loser, with the technique delta being I2S.
value_profile resolves the branch in all 10 trials while value_profile_cmplog blocks in all 10, isolating I2S as the harmful added technique.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
winner: resolved=10/10  blocked=0  unreached=0
  loser:  resolved=0/10  blocked=10  unreached=0

evidence_trail.claim: The winner takes the CCC132 true side 23 times whereas the loser never takes it.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: d=1   L 160  T=23 F=62  T=0 F=43  case HB_MODIFIED_COMBINING_CLASS_CCC132: /* sign u */  <-- BLOCKER

evidence_trail.claim: cmplog adds I2SRandReplace which scans the input for one operand and substitutes the other at matching offsets, spending budget on byte-level CMP matching.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
`I2SRandReplace` reads the post-execution `CmpLogObserver` buffer,
picks a CMP entry, scans the input for byte sequences matching one
operand, and substitutes the other operand at those offsets.

evidence_trail.claim: naive uses only havoc + token byte mutation with no I2S stage.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: **Observed `mutation_op` in seed metadata**: any of the above. No I2S.

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile has no I2SRandReplace mutator, only havoc + token stack.
There is no informative byte-level divergence between winner and loser seeds, consistent with the gate being a derived value rather than an input literal an I2S operand could target.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: [no informative byte-level divergence — seeds look structurally similar across W and L at every offset, OR diverge only at high-entropy positions (noise)]

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: claimed_mechanism is havoc-only, not I2SRandReplace, so lineage verification is not mandatory. The winners (naive, value_profile) carry no I2S mutator, so there is no I2S-floor dash-row signal to confirm on the winning side; this is an I2S-anti case where the I2S-bearing fuzzers are the losers, and the winner reaches the branch by plain coverage-guided havoc byte mutation over valid font structure.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness in which placing the CCC132-triggering codepoint/combining-class value as a literal at a fixed input offset causes cmplog/value_profile_cmplog to resolve the branch FASTER than naive/value_profile, which would show the gate is I2S-solvable rather than I2S-neutral and the divergence is not due to wasted I2S budget.

weakest_evidence_point: The claim that I2S budget is actively wasted (rather than the loss being statistical noise of a hard deep-shaping branch) is inferred from the I2S-anti pair direction plus the absence of byte-level divergence, not from direct lineage evidence on the losers.
